generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to maintain our preparedness infrastructure. The current administration's cuts to local emergency response budgets are putting communities at risk. We can't afford to be complacent - our national security depends on being ready for any scenario. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
